questions.text: What is the primary goal of MPLS-TP as mentioned in the transport network overview?

options.text: To provide connection-oriented transport for packet and TDM services
To replace all optical fiber with copper
To eliminate the need for IP addresses entirely

questions.text: Which MPLS function is disabled in MPLS-TP to ensure full traceability of paths for OAM packets?

options.text: Pseudo-wires, as implemented in current network deployments.

questions.text: In MPLS-TP, why is 'LSP Merge' disabled?

options.text: To increase the number of labels
To simplify circuit management and differentiate traffic from different sources
